title: Replace injected pushNotificationRegistrar with PushNotificationRegistrar.save(token:) static
source_finding: D2 architecture finding: AppDelegate property injection is solving a race that the existing static singleton handles by construction

title: Make PushNotificationRegistrar.save(token:) graceful (log+no-op when unconfigured)
source_finding: D10 test review finding: fatalError on hot path crashes test/extension code paths instead of degrading

title: Remove fresh PlatformProviders.iOS construction from DebugView.registerDeviceAgain
source_finding: Existing-code finding at DebugView.swift:402 creates a new IOSPushNotificationRegistrar with nil token, fighting app state

title: Extract computeDesiredSubscriptions(kinds:params:) private actor method
source_finding: D7 code-quality finding: compute and send are coupled, blocks debounce and diagnostics layers

title: Add hash debounce cache (env+accountId+deviceId+clientId+apnsEnv+pushTokenSha256); write only on success; clear on identity rotation
source_finding: D8 cache contract + codex P1 accountId-in-key + sign-out-clear hardening

title: discoverNewConversations returns Int; requestDiscovery gates reconcile on count>0
source_finding: D3 architecture finding: requestDiscovery floods backend during stuck join polling

title: Add .convosPushTokenDidChange listener that calls reconcilePushSubscriptions(context: after token change)
source_finding: D14 cross-model P0: D3 count-gate misses token rotation reconcile trigger

title: Add inline ASCII diagrams at AppDelegate token receive, reconcilePushTopics, requestDiscovery
source_finding: D9 code-quality finding: lifecycle invariants are non-obvious; user preference is to embed diagrams

title: Regression test asserting .iOSExtension PlatformProviders does not crash on save(token:)
source_finding: Codex P2 footgun: extension PlatformProviders does not call configure()

title: Prisma migration: NotificationSubscriptionSnapshot (with at-apply fields) + ClientIdentifier.accountId + backfill
source_finding: D4 + D13 + D15: snapshot model with at-apply correctness state, ClientIdentifier accountId for cross-account prevention

title: Subscribe handler: Zod-optional new fields; accountId from JWT; idempotency via at-apply; response {ok, remoteApplied, snapshot, skipped?}; snapshot persist
source_finding: D6 + D11 + D13 + D16: subscribe response shape, idempotency at-apply check, remoteApplied contract

title: POST /v2/notifications/debug/status endpoint (JWT-gated, hashes-only, rate-limited 1/sec/JWT, accountId-scoped)
source_finding: D5 architecture finding: prod-safe debug endpoint for investigating prod-only push outages

title: Reset disabled=false, pushFailures=0 in /v2/device/register when token differs from stored
source_finding: D17b codex P1: auto-disabled devices stay disabled after token rotation

title: nseAuthMiddleware with reduced privilege; mount on /notifications/unregister
source_finding: D17a codex P0: NSE unregister rejected by authMiddleware, ClientIdentifier orphans accumulate

title: Webhook accountId enforcement: drop deliveries where client.accountId != device.accountId
source_finding: D15 codex P0: cross-account push delivery via stale ClientIdentifier rows

title: Webhook unknown-installation structured diagnostic log
source_finding: Original plan finding + D15 hardening

title: DebugPushNotificationsView + ViewModel: local/backend state display, actions, registrarConfigured row
source_finding: Original plan + codex P1 registrarConfigured surface for bootstrap bugs

title: iOS subscribe API: add force/context/source/kindSummary params; parse remoteApplied+skipped; update D8 cache to write only on remoteApplied
source_finding: D16 cross-model P1: closes Stack 1 T5 cache contract once backend ships remoteApplied

title: Pin hash canonicalization in code comments (sorted UTF-8, LF separator, SHA-256 hex lowercase); cross-link iOS and backend
source_finding: Codex P2: cross-stack hash spec must be unambiguous

title: Add accountId to backend Subscribing to topics log line
source_finding: Broken-device validation: Datadog filters had no accountId field, forcing deviceId lookup via account first. One-line backend fix.

title: One-time orphan ClientIdentifier cleanup migration + optional XMTP unregister follow-up
source_finding: Broken-device validation: 24 orphan ClientIdentifier rows accumulated over 4 months on one device. Same-account variant not caught by T15 going forward; needs explicit cleanup of historical data. SQL keeps most-recent row per device, deletes rows older than 7 days.

title: Disable LibXMTP logging in NSE to work around tracing-oslog panic
source_finding: Broken-device validation: NSE crashes in tracing-oslog-0.3.0/src/logger.rs:166 ("invalid span, this shouldn't happen") on physical iOS device when processing 5+ envelope backlog. Filed upstream; mitigation already shipped in PR #908.
